name: Reece Limited
analysis: REH's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$16.4000. Trade idea: entry A$16.7300, stop A$14.9441, target A$22.0878 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
